rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §43.069, which governs annual investment reporting for the permanent school fund. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The corporation shall annually submit to the State Board of Education and the General Land Office a report on the allocation of assets and investment performance of the portion of the permanent school fund for which the corporation is responsible.
_note: No conflict. Rule concerns PSF investment reporting; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. Unrelated provisions.
